characters.name: Blitz Reset
characters.powers: Stolen powers extracted from O-verse beings via custom gun + amplification machine. Known abilities: fire spiral, mind reading, cloaked heat signature, + many more accumulated over years.
characters.motivations: Family of heroes died stopping O-verse attack. Something broke — decided ALL villains must die. Genuinely believes he's saving the world.
characters.relationships: Enemy of Hunthesk's team. Body-swapped with Hunthesk during battle.
characters.description: Brilliant, cold, methodical, haunted. Cocky in battle. Can't distinguish justice from revenge — sees villain = death sentence, no exceptions.
characters.visualNotes: Dark tactical gear, extraction gun as signature weapon. GREEN energy color during the swap.

characters.name: Hunthesk
characters.powers: TBD — strong enough to grab Blitz and survive his fire spiral twice. Leader-class O-verse being.
characters.motivations: Protect his kind at all costs. Investigating the disappearances of O-verse beings. Wants justice/revenge for the drained and killed.
characters.relationships: Leader of the investigation team. Commands Wave Blade and ArrowShock. Body-swapped with Blitz.
characters.description: Protective, righteous, fierce. Blind loyalty — protects ALL O-verse beings regardless of what they've done.
characters.visualNotes: ORANGE energy color. O-verse being design.

characters.name: Wave Blade
characters.powers: Creates a shield that disrupts wave frequencies. Can destabilize energy-based attacks and barriers.
characters.motivations: Loyal to Hunthesk and the O-verse protection mission. Likely feels guilty about accidentally causing the body swap.
characters.relationships: Four-in-Command on Hunthesk's team. Works alongside ArrowShock.
characters.description: Female. Rank: Four-in-Command (4th in hierarchy). Her power's critical drawback: sometimes overcharges, causing frequencies to MIX instead of disrupt — this caused the body swap.
characters.visualNotes: Wavy energy lines, fluid design. Shield shimmers/ripples like disturbed water.

characters.name: ArrowShock
characters.powers: Energy arrows that can pierce defenses and create vulnerability in targets.
characters.relationships: On Hunthesk's team. His arrow to Blitz's heart made Blitz vulnerable to Wave Blade's accidental frequency merge.
characters.description: O-verse being. His vulnerability strike was one of three factors that caused the body swap.

synopsis: A grief-stricken human who stole powers from interdimensional beings to exterminate all villains is forced to see through his enemy's eyes — literally — when a freak body-swap traps him in the body of the very beings he's been hunting.
